title: dianthus cretaceus subsp. multicaulis
intro: Dianthus cretaceus subsp. multicaulis is a sub-species of the Dianthus cretaceus plant, commonly known as a type of carnation. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus cretaceous subsp. multicaulis include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
